heading: Regulations
label: 2908 Regulations
text: Subject to applicable law, the Archivist shall promulgate regulations governing the transfer of records from the custody of one executive agency to that of another.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesBased on 44 U.S. Code, 1964 ed., § 395(e) (, title V, § 505(e), as added , ).June 30, 1949, ch. 288Sept. 5, 1950, ch. 849, § 6(d)64 Stat. 583
Amendments1984— substituted “Archivist” for “Administrator of General Services”.Pub. L. 98–497
